doctrine_enforcement_lines: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.

files_forbidden_to_change: Any Phase 6B capability behavior implementation beyond scaffold/control scope.
Any production adapter credential or external provider integration.
Any UI screen implementation without approved screen contract.
Any Prisma migration unless explicitly named in the active scaffold ticket.
Any file outside the ticket files_expected_to_change.
tickets.conditional_replan_required: Required if current HEAD differs, exact files already exist, validation commands are unavailable, or scope requires a business capability decision.
stale_ticket_risk_notes: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.
This scaffold-control ticket must be regenerated from current HEAD before execution.
Do not implement Phase 6B business capability behavior in scaffold-control tickets.
Package script ownership is intentionally delegated to P6B-SCAF-004 so contract/manifest scaffold definitions do not overlap validation-command wiring.
split_if: Split if the ticket owns more than one architectural decision.
Split if the ticket creates more than one runtime subsystem.
Split if the ticket mixes policy interpretation with runtime implementation.
Split if the ticket mixes backend, frontend, database, and CI without a contract boundary.
Split if schema/contracts and runtime code change without a narrow reason.
Split if validation ladders are unrelated.
Split if file ownership overlaps another ticket.
Split if review would require unrelated context switching.
Split if dependencies are hidden behind vague wording.
Split if Codex would need to invent decisions during execution.
requires_human_approval_if: Any file outside files_expected_to_change is needed.
A business capability behavior decision is required.
A Prisma migration is needed but not explicitly authorized.
A screen/API/event/permission boundary is not source-grounded.
tickets.title: Create Phase 6B contract and manifest scaffold definitions
tickets.objective: Add source-grounded Phase 6B contract and manifest scaffold files for all 15 Phase 6B components without implementing capability runtime behavior.
scope: Create Phase 6B contract and module_manifest scaffold definitions for the 15 source components using v11/v13 lifecycle classifications.
Add a contracts validation script for Phase 6B scaffold shape only.
non_scope: No capability behavior, API routes, provider integration, or UI screens.
required_outputs: Phase 6B contract scaffold files parse and expose lifecycle-safe metadata only.
Phase 6B module_manifest scaffold files declare manifest keys, dependencies, billability/evidence metadata, and no runtime implementation.
tests_required: Phase 6B contract/manifest scaffold validation covers all 15 components and rejects missing source authority, dependency, manifest, and ticket-generation flags.
stop_conditions: Stop if exact-file plan reveals work requires files_forbidden_to_change.
Stop if the ticket cannot be completed without making an architectural decision not present in any committed source document.
Stop if validation fails after 3 bounded repair attempts.
Stop if work drifts into runtime / Foundry / module installer / business modules / production auth / deployment / secrets / destructive migrations without explicit ticket authority.
Stop if a Prisma schema migration is required but not authorized in files_expected_to_change.
Stop if contract files would encode business behavior beyond scaffold metadata.
Stop if module manifest schema must change and no approved schema ticket exists.
acceptance_criteria: All Phase 6B contract/manifest scaffold files exist and validate.
No Phase 6B capability implementation code is created.
tickets.commit_message: contracts: add Phase 6B contract and manifest scaffolds
tickets.rollback_notes: Remove only the Phase 6B contract/manifest scaffold files and validator wiring added by this ticket.
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: `pnpm contracts:validate` passes and proves all 15 Phase 6B contract/manifest scaffold definitions are present with ticket_generation_allowed=false.

tickets.title: Record Phase 6B Prisma ownership and migration decision plan
tickets.objective: Create the Prisma ownership and migration-decision artifact required before any Phase 6B schema or migration ticket can be written.
scope: Map Phase 6B owned-data authorities to proposed Prisma model ownership groups.
Decide whether each group requires schema, metadata-only ownership, or deferred future integration.
required_outputs: Machine-readable Prisma ownership decision artifact with model groups, migration requirement status, and stop conditions.
tests_required: Decision artifact validates against v14 Prisma ownership discovery rows and names no migration as authorized unless explicitly approved.
stop_conditions: Stop if exact-file plan reveals work requires files_forbidden_to_change.
Stop if the ticket cannot be completed without making an architectural decision not present in any committed source document.
Stop if validation fails after 3 bounded repair attempts.
Stop if work drifts into runtime / Foundry / module installer / business modules / production auth / deployment / secrets / destructive migrations without explicit ticket authority.
Stop if a Prisma schema migration is required but not authorized in files_expected_to_change.
Stop if schema changes are required to complete the decision artifact.
Stop if an ownership group cannot be resolved from source authority.
acceptance_criteria: Every Phase 6B owned-data authority has an ownership decision status.
Future schema tickets can reference this artifact without inventing ownership.
tickets.commit_message: docs: record Phase 6B Prisma ownership decision plan
tickets.rollback_notes: Remove only the Prisma ownership decision artifacts created by this ticket.
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: Named artifact `phase_6b_prisma_ownership_decision_v1.json` covers all 15 Phase 6B components and `pnpm exec prisma validate --schema prisma/schema.prisma` still passes without schema changes.

tickets.title: Create Phase 6B NestJS module boundary scaffolds
tickets.objective: Create compile-safe NestJS module/controller/service scaffold boundaries for Phase 6B components, with no business behavior implementation.
scope: Create Phase 6B NestJS module folders and boundary files for all 15 source components.
Wire only scaffold-level imports necessary for typecheck, without routes that expose business behavior.
non_scope: No business methods beyond scaffold health/metadata proof if approved by contracts.
required_outputs: Compile-safe Phase 6B API scaffold boundary with no capability behavior.
tests_required: Each scaffold service test proves the boundary exists, exposes metadata only, and does not perform business behavior.
stop_conditions: Stop if exact-file plan reveals work requires files_forbidden_to_change.
Stop if the ticket cannot be completed without making an architectural decision not present in any committed source document.
Stop if validation fails after 3 bounded repair attempts.
Stop if work drifts into runtime / Foundry / module installer / business modules / production auth / deployment / secrets / destructive migrations without explicit ticket authority.
Stop if a Prisma schema migration is required but not authorized in files_expected_to_change.
Stop if scaffolding requires Prisma schema changes not authorized by P6B-SCAF-002.
Stop if any business capability behavior is needed to make tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: Phase 6B module boundaries exist but do not implement capability behavior.
tickets.commit_message: api: add Phase 6B NestJS boundary scaffolds
tickets.rollback_notes: Remove only Phase 6B API scaffold files and app-module import added by this ticket.
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: `pnpm --filter @akti/api typecheck` and scaffold tests pass while Phase 6B services expose metadata-only boundaries and no capability behavior.

tickets.title: Add Phase 6B scaffold validation command wiring
tickets.objective: Add validation wiring that proves Phase 6B scaffold contracts, manifests, Prisma ownership decisions, and NestJS boundaries remain aligned before capability tickets are generated.
scope: Create scaffold validation script and package script wiring.
Validate all Phase 6B scaffold layers without executing business capability behavior.
non_scope: No contracts or API scaffold files owned here except validation references.
tests_required: Validation script fails if contract/manifest/API scaffold rows drift from v14 scaffold-control expectations.
stop_conditions: Stop if exact-file plan reveals work requires files_forbidden_to_change.
Stop if the ticket cannot be completed without making an architectural decision not present in any committed source document.
Stop if validation fails after 3 bounded repair attempts.
Stop if work drifts into runtime / Foundry / module installer / business modules / production auth / deployment / secrets / destructive migrations without explicit ticket authority.
Stop if a Prisma schema migration is required but not authorized in files_expected_to_change.
Stop if validation requires codegen or runtime behavior.
Stop if script would mutate tracked files.
acceptance_criteria: Validation command reports contract, manifest, Prisma decision, API scaffold, and ticket-generation false counts.
tickets.rollback_notes: Remove scaffold-control validation script and package script entries added by this ticket.
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: `node scripts/quality/check_phase_6b_scaffold_control.mjs` passes and reports no capability implementation tickets authorized.

tickets.title: Gate Phase 6B scaffold-control completion before capability ticketing
tickets.objective: Prove scaffold-control tickets completed without creating Phase 6B capability implementation tickets or enabling ticket generation.
scope: Run scaffold-control validation and produce gate evidence.
Confirm no capability implementation ticket pack exists yet.
required_outputs: Gate report showing scaffold-control readiness and implementation ticket generation remains blocked.
tests_required: Gate evidence includes command outputs or unavailable-command explanations for scaffold-control validation.
stop_conditions: Stop if exact-file plan reveals work requires files_forbidden_to_change.
Stop if the ticket cannot be completed without making an architectural decision not present in any committed source document.
Stop if validation fails after 3 bounded repair attempts.
Stop if work drifts into runtime / Foundry / module installer / business modules / production auth / deployment / secrets / destructive migrations without explicit ticket authority.
Stop if a Prisma schema migration is required but not authorized in files_expected_to_change.
Stop if any Phase 6B capability implementation ticket is present.
Stop if ticket_generation_allowed becomes true.
acceptance_criteria: Gate report says scaffold-control complete or lists blockers.
Capability implementation ticket generation remains false.
tickets.commit_message: docs: add Phase 6B scaffold-control gate evidence
tickets.rollback_notes: Remove only scaffold-control gate report artifacts.
tickets.minimum_concrete_requirement: Gate report artifact confirms scaffold-control validation passed and capability implementation ticket generation remains false.
